data.name: Hardrock Sex 3D
data.detailed_description:
Check out the game from our friends!


關於此遊戲



Get ready to rock this night with Hardrock Sex 3D!

Hardrock Sex 3D is a dynamic rhythm game with elements of visual novel. Meet our characters, discover their story and explore all the hot scenes they have to offer.

Each level is a test of your music skills, attention and ability to act quickly. In order to pass the level you have to press the buttons in the right order and correct timing. Only then you'll be able to progress further through the story and see all amazing stuff are female protagonists prepared.



Get ready to hone your unique musical skills!

Features:


  • 2 hot and attractive female protagonists
  • 3D visual novel
  • rock-n-roll atmosphere
  • 8 realistic 3D sex scenes

Let’s get started!

最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 HZ
